creator: scrappy@ki.net
text:
No savecore core is available for debuggging...haven't been able to
	get one out of -stable for months now ;(

	Prior to dropping to DDB, this error message was sent to the console:

	kernel page directory invalid pdir = 0x7b1063, va = 0xc000


	DDB Trace/Output:

	Debugger+0x2b
	panic+0x3b
	pmap_enter+0x73
	vm_fault+0xf43
	vm_fault_wire+0xe4
	vm_map_pageable+0x26a
	vslock+0x2d
	sysctl+0x18a
	syscall+0xf3
	Xsyscall+0x2b
	--- syscall 202, eip = 0x8071515, ebp = 0xefbfdcb0
